description: arXiv:2606.15206v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We study how artificial intelligence (AI) interacts with social communication networks to shape the stability of collective knowledge. Agents exchange information through a network while AI systems generate content and retrain on the aggregate informational environment they influence. This interaction creates a recursive feedback loop in...
